summary: #90445 remains the open canonical issue. #90831 is a related contributor PR for the Sessions table tooltip work but is not merge-ready or a fixed-by closeout candidate because checks include failures and bot-review blockers remain. #91682 is a related partial PR for the Quick Settings Thinking tooltip, a different UI surface from #90831, so it should not be forced into a duplicate or superseded outcome in this cluster.

actions.reason: #90445 is still open and remains the broadest surviving canonical thread for the dropdown labeling and tooltip clarification work.
This PR is useful related implementation for the canonical issue, but it is not safe to merge or use for fixed-by closure in this plan because failing checks and review-bot blockers remain.
#91682 is a related partial fix for the same canonical issue on a different UI surface; keep it related instead of closing or superseding it.
